# Changelog

All notable changes to the @nice-devone/ui-controls package will be documented in this file.

## [0.0.1] - 2026-02-26

### Added
- Initial public release of foundational UI Controls library
- Provides base controls and utilities used by @nice-devone/ui-components
- Form controls, action controls, navigation controls, feedback controls, data controls
- Layout utilities and CXone theme configuration
- Material-UI based component architecture with TypeScript definitions

### Notes
- Foundational library extracted from CMA application
- Used internally by @nice-devone/ui-components package
- See README.md for detailed documentation

### Known Issues
- None at this time

### Future Enhancements
- Additional control variations based on user feedback
- Enhanced accessibility features
- More theme customization options
- Performance optimizations
